label: Rich Text
description: Editorial long-form content with optional eyebrow, heading, and rich HTML body (blockquotes, lists, subheadings)

test_data.heading: Why we built VibeCMS
test_data.body:
The modern web has become a cacophony of fragmented tools and cluttered interfaces. We observed a growing divide between technical flexibility and creative intuition. VibeCMS was born from the desire to bridge this gap—to create a “Luminous Curator” that treats content management as an editorial art form rather than a database entry task.

Great design is not just about how it looks, but how it feels to navigate the complexity of human knowledge.

A new paradigm of intelligence

We didn't just want another dashboard. We wanted a space where AI assists rather than dominates. Our goal was to build an environment where complex data structures are distilled into a refined, high-performance gallery experience.

  • Asymmetric layouts that respect the natural hierarchy of information.
  • Warm, high-contrast typography that reduces visual fatigue.
  • A design system that treats every card as a physical object.
